sections.paragraph: ἀπόϰειμαι [ἀπό in sense of ‘away’, κεῖμαι] be laid away, with focus on safekeeping Lk 19:20; in imagery, of ἐλπίς Col 1:5; of a victor’s wreath be reserved 2 Ti 4:8. Impersonal, of an event that is certain and not subject to change ἀπόϰειταί τινι be appointed/determined for someone Hb 9:27.
